Package io.cloudstub.core.internal

Class WireMockStubRegistrar

java.lang.Object
io.cloudstub.core.internal.WireMockStubRegistrar
All Implemented Interfaces:
StubRegistrar
public final class WireMockStubRegistrar extends Object implements StubRegistrar
Internal StubRegistrar implementation that delegates to a live WireMock server. Never exposed outside io.cloudstub.core.internal.

Each registration is also recorded in the ServiceRegistry under the current service ID so that CloudStubResponseTransformer can look up a matched stub's protocol when decorating its response with a fault.

Stubs are named cloudstub:<serviceId>:<matchKey> so that CloudStub.requestHistory() can correlate serve events back to their service, and so the transformer can recover the service ID and match key of a matched stub from its name.

  • Constructor Details

    • WireMockStubRegistrar

      public WireMockStubRegistrar(com.github.tomakehurst.wiremock.WireMockServer server, CloudStubResponseTransformer transformer, ServiceRegistry registry)

  • Method Details

    • setCurrentService

      public void setCurrentService(String serviceId)
      Called by CloudStub before each service module registers its stubs.

    • registerXmlFormStub

      public void registerXmlFormStub(String actionName, String responseTemplate)
      Description copied from interface: StubRegistrar
      Registers a stub for XML/Form URL services (e.g. SQS, SNS).

      Matches any POST request whose application/x-www-form-urlencoded body contains Action=<actionName>.

      Specified by:
      registerXmlFormStub in interface StubRegistrar
      Parameters:
      actionName - the value of the Action form parameter, e.g. "SendMessage"
      responseTemplate - Handlebars template for the HTTP response body

    • registerJsonTargetStub

      public void registerJsonTargetStub(String target, String responseTemplate)
      Description copied from interface: StubRegistrar
      Registers a stub for JSON / X-Amz-Target services (e.g. Secrets Manager, DynamoDB).

      Matches any POST request whose X-Amz-Target header equals target.

      Specified by:
      registerJsonTargetStub in interface StubRegistrar
      Parameters:
      target - full target header value, e.g. "secretsmanager.GetSecretValue"
      responseTemplate - Handlebars template for the HTTP response body

    • registerRestStub

      public void registerRestStub(HttpMethod method, String pathPattern, String responseTemplate)
      Description copied from interface: StubRegistrar
      Registers a stub for REST path-based services (e.g. S3).

      Matches requests whose HTTP method equals method and whose path matches pathPattern as a regular expression.

      Specified by:
      registerRestStub in interface StubRegistrar
      Parameters:
      method - HTTP method to match
      pathPattern - regular expression matched against the request path
      responseTemplate - Handlebars template for the HTTP response body

    • registerXmlFormStub

      public void registerXmlFormStub(String actionName, StubHandler handler)
      Description copied from interface: StubRegistrar
      Registers a stateful stub for XML/Form URL services (e.g. SQS, SNS).

      Matches like StubRegistrar.registerXmlFormStub(String, String), but invokes handler on each request instead of rendering a static template.

      Specified by:
      registerXmlFormStub in interface StubRegistrar
      Parameters:
      actionName - the value of the Action form parameter, e.g. "SendMessage"
      handler - request-time handler with access to the state store

    • registerJsonTargetStub

      public void registerJsonTargetStub(String target, StubHandler handler)
      Description copied from interface: StubRegistrar
      Registers a stateful stub for JSON / X-Amz-Target services (e.g. SQS, DynamoDB).

      Matches like StubRegistrar.registerJsonTargetStub(String, String), but invokes handler on each request instead of rendering a static template, giving the module access to the shared StateStore.

      Specified by:
      registerJsonTargetStub in interface StubRegistrar
      Parameters:
      target - full target header value, e.g. "AmazonSQS.SendMessage"
      handler - request-time handler with access to the state store

    • registerRestStub

      public void registerRestStub(HttpMethod method, String pathPattern, StubHandler handler)
      Description copied from interface: StubRegistrar
      Registers a stateful stub for REST path-based services (e.g. S3).

      Matches like StubRegistrar.registerRestStub(HttpMethod, String, String), but invokes handler on each request instead of rendering a static template.

      Specified by:
      registerRestStub in interface StubRegistrar
      Parameters:
      method - HTTP method to match
      pathPattern - regular expression matched against the request path
      handler - request-time handler with access to the state store

    • moduleStatuses

      public List<ModuleStatus> moduleStatuses()
      Returns a live snapshot of all modules and their registered stubs.
